creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
John, sorry, missed your reply till now.
Thank you for looking into this.

I must say straight away that this is a
laptop with a "broken" BIOS, for which
you provided this patch:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2012-May/033598.html

which has since been merged with the tree.
